opening_complaint.verbatim_patient_text: My right leg has been huge and heavy for years, but today a patch of skin turned bright red, hot, and extremely painful.
opening_complaint.stated_reason_for_presenting_today: The swelling I've had for ages is normal for me, but this new red hot sore patch came up in the last day and it's really painful — I'm worried about it.

symptom_narrative.onset: The swelling started about five years ago after an operation in my tummy/pelvis and has slowly got worse. The new red painful patch came up in the last 24 hours.
symptom_narrative.duration: The big heavy leg has been there for years; the red hot patch is about a day old.
symptom_narrative.character: The leg feels heavy and achy all the time. The new patch is bright red, hot to touch and really tender and sore.
symptom_narrative.severity_patient_description: The whole leg is a constant dull heavy ache; the red patch is very painful.
symptom_narrative.location_as_patient_describes: The whole right leg is swollen from my toes up. The sore red patch is on the front of my shin.
symptom_narrative.timing_pattern: The heaviness is there all the time; the red patch has been getting more sore since yesterday.
symptom_narrative.what_makes_it_better: Resting and putting the leg up eases the heaviness a bit.
symptom_narrative.what_makes_it_worse: Being on my feet makes the heaviness worse; touching the red patch hurts.
symptom_narrative.associated_symptoms_volunteered: I feel a bit warm and off-colour, like a mild fever. No shaking chills and I haven't been vomiting.
symptom_narrative.previous_episodes: I've had red sore skin infections in this leg before and had treatment for them.
symptom_narrative.functional_impact: It's hard to get around because the leg is so big and heavy; I worry about tripping and falling, especially living on my own.

past_medical_history.condition_as_patient_states: Long-standing swelling of the right leg since a pelvic operation years ago
past_medical_history.how_managed: compression stockings, though I don't always wear them

past_medical_history.condition_as_patient_states: Repeated skin infections in the same leg in the past

social_history_volunteered.relevant_life_context: Lives alone; getting around is hard because of the heavy swollen leg, so I'm a bit isolated and worried about falls.

objective_data_offered.value: the whole right leg is massively swollen from the toes up to the groin, much bigger than the other leg; the skin is thick, hard and looks a bit like orange peel
objective_data_offered.reliability_caveat: patient/carer video only — no measurement or examination possible

objective_data_offered.value: a patch on the front of the shin, roughly the size of a hand, that is bright red, shiny and looks hot and angry
objective_data_offered.reliability_caveat: colour and extent on a home camera are unreliable; true margins and warmth cannot be judged remotely

objective_data_offered.value: feels warm and mildly feverish, but no shaking chills (rigors) and no vomiting
37.8 C on my home thermometer, feel a bit hot
objective_data_offered.reliability_caveat: single reading on an uncalibrated home thermometer

objective_data_offered.value: compression garments are laid out at home but not being worn at the moment
